---
name: Bug Report
about: Report bugs
title: "[Bug] SomeBugHere"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

<!---
### README(You do not need to remove this text as it is a comment)
Please see if there is an already existing Issue with the same bug before posting a Bug Report! 
-->
### Bug
- [ ] Describe the bug clearly here.
- [ ] Attach media(screenshots, videos) of the issue if possible
- [ ] Include the full f3 screen *or* the information below:
   - GPU (and GPU vendor)
   - Operating system
   - Minecraft version
   - Minecraft Client
   - Shader version
   - Suspect/troublesome (rendering) mods

### Reproducing the bug
- [ ] Include the cause of the bug if possible; may it be a mod, minecraft client, shader setting, etc.
- [ ] (Optional) Include the shader settings file(`shaderpacks/SomeShaderName.txt`)
